info.title: DJD Agent Score API
info.description: Trust infrastructure for AI agent wallets on Base. DJD helps apps and agent operators score wallets, publish public trust surfaces, and enforce payout or settlement policy before money moves. Use it for agent marketplaces, payout and escrow flows, paid tools, and automated settlement decisions. Paid endpoints support x402 on Base or API-key access for developer teams; free endpoints require no authentication. Interactive docs available at /docs.

tags.name: monitoring
tags.description: Managed score and DJD Forensics monitoring subscriptions

tags.name: forensics
tags.description: DJD Forensics wallet overview and incident timelines (paid)

tags.name: certification
tags.description: Certified Agent Badge (paid, admin, and public)

get.description: Returns composite score, tier, confidence, recommendation, and model version. Free tier: 10 requests/day per IP. No payment required.

200.description: Score returned (may include stale:true if RPC was unavailable)

get.description: Returns a free ERC-8004-compatible reputation document for a wallet, bundling the latest DJD score with registration, certification, and on-chain publication status.

Returns the composite score plus all four dimension scores (reliability, viability, identity, capability), integrity flags, data availability assessment, and improvement path. **Requires x402 payment of $0.10 USDC on Base.**
ERC-8183 evaluator prototype that returns an approve, review, or reject recommendation for settlement readiness, plus links into standards and forensics surfaces.

Returns a risk prediction view for a wallet using fraud pressure, fraud-pattern matches, sybil and gaming signals, counterparty ratings, and transaction-intent outcomes. **Requires x402 payment of $0.50 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**
Returns a cluster view for a wallet using relationship-graph structure, risk signals, and persisted cluster assignments. **Requires x402 payment of $0.15 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max cluster peers and linked wallets to return (default 10, max 25)

post.description: Bypasses the cache and triggers a fresh on-chain scan. Returns the full score response. **Requires x402 payment of $0.25 USDC on Base.** Prefer POST; GET is accepted for backward compatibility but deprecated.

get.description: **Deprecated.** Use `POST /v1/score/refresh` instead. This GET alias is kept for backward compatibility only.

post.description: Submits a background full-scan scoring job and returns a `jobId` immediately (HTTP 202). Use `GET /v1/score/job/{jobId}` to poll for completion. Free — no payment required. Useful when the caller cannot wait 20-150s for the synchronous endpoints.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Wallet address (deprecated — prefer JSON body)

requestBody.description: Preferred: pass wallet in JSON body

pollUrl.description: Relative URL to poll for job status

get.description: Returns the current status of a scoring job submitted via `POST /v1/score/compute`. Jobs expire after 10 minutes.

post.description: Voluntarily register a wallet with optional metadata. Adds +15 identity points to the score and marks the wallet as registered on the leaderboard. GitHub URL is asynchronously verified against the GitHub API. Free — no payment required.

get.description: Returns registration metadata for a wallet. Free — no payment required.

post.description: Submit a fraud or misconduct report against a wallet. Verified reports reduce the target wallet's composite score by up to 25 points. **Requires x402 payment of $0.02 USDC on Base.**

reporter.description: Wallet submitting the report (must differ from target)

details.description: Supporting details and evidence (required, max 1000 chars)

post.description: Submit a transaction-backed 1-5 star rating for a counterparty wallet. The payer wallet becomes the rater, and the `tx_hash` must reference an indexed transaction worth at least $0.10 USDC between the two wallets. **Requires x402 payment of $0.01 USDC on Base.**

Registers a creator-to-agent USDC stake after validating two indexed transfers: the creator's stake transfer to the agent wallet and a separate 1% DJD fee transfer to `PAY_TO`. This route does not use x402 pricing; the fee is validated directly from on-chain USDC transfers.

get.description: Check whether a wallet has active fraud reports filed against it. Returns the count and most recent reports. **Requires x402 payment of $0.05 USDC on Base.**
Returns aggregate mutual-rating sentiment and recent transaction-backed ratings for a wallet. **Requires x402 payment of $0.10 USDC on Base.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum ratings to return (default: 25, max: 100)

get.description: Returns intent-conversion data for a wallet based on paid lookups and whether they were followed by on-chain deals. **Requires x402 payment of $0.25 USDC on Base.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum intent records to return (default: 25, max: 100)

get.description: Returns the historical score decay curve for a wallet using hourly score snapshots, plus trend and trajectory analysis. **Requires x402 payment of $0.15 USDC on Base.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum decay points to return (default: 50, max: 100)

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Inclusive ISO 8601 lower bound for `recorded_at`.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Inclusive ISO 8601 upper bound for `recorded_at`.

get.description: Returns directional relationship-graph intelligence for a wallet, including top counterparties and aggregate flow totals. **Requires x402 payment of $0.20 USDC on Base.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum counterparties to return (default: 25, max: 100)

get.description: Returns the top 50 wallets by composite score. Registered wallets are sorted first. Free — no payment required.
Returns an embeddable shields.io-style SVG badge showing the wallet's current score and tier. Cached for 10 minutes. Free — no payment required.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Full 40-character hex wallet address (without .svg extension)

get.description: Returns public service health for any caller, and includes runtime/database/indexer/job detail when called with a valid admin key. Release metadata is exposed when the deploy image is stamped with build identifiers.
Serves a Swagger UI interface for exploring and testing the API interactively. Free — no payment required.
Returns aggregated ecosystem health metrics: unique wallets scored, total queries, revenue, average scores, and more. Free — no payment required.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Aggregation period (default: daily)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return (max 90, default 30)

get.description: Returns cohort survival, 7/30/90-day retention, tier-level survival, and an at-risk wallet board derived from wallet activity and recent score decay. **Requires x402 payment of $0.15 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max at-risk wallets to return (default 20, max 100)

get.description: Returns aggregated ecosystem summary metrics by period from `economy_metrics`. **Requires x402 payment of $0.10 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Aggregation period (default: daily)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return (max 90, default 30)

get.description: Returns transaction count and USDC flow time series by period from `economy_metrics`. **Requires x402 payment of $0.10 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Aggregation period (default: daily)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return (max 90, default 30)

post.description: Score up to 20 wallets in a single request. Returns basic score data for each wallet. **Requires x402 payment of $0.50 USDC on Base.**

wallets.description: Array of wallet addresses to score

get.description: Returns Prometheus-compatible metrics in text exposition format. Includes HTTP request counters, database gauges, and process metrics. Free — no payment required.

post.description: Creates a new API key for a wallet. The raw key is returned only once on creation — store it securely. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**

wallet.description: Wallet address to associate with the key

name.description: Optional human-readable name for the key

get.description: Returns all API keys with usage stats. Raw keys are never returned — only prefixes. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**

delete.description: Soft-deletes an API key by marking it as revoked. The key will no longer authenticate requests. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: API key ID

404.description: API key not found or already revoked

post.description: Registers a new wallet-scoped webhook subscription. Provide either `events`, `preset`, or `presets`. If `score.threshold` is selected without an explicit `threshold_score`, the service defaults to 60. Use `forensics_filter` to restrict DJD Forensics alerts by minimum resulting risk level and/or report reasons. Managed presets also include anomaly-driven monitoring for score drops, balance freefalls, and new Sybil flags. The webhook secret is returned only once, so store it securely to verify signatures. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**

url.description: HTTPS endpoint to receive webhook payloads

events.description: Explicit events to subscribe to. May be combined with presets.

preset.description: Optional preset that expands to a managed event set

presets.description: Optional preset bundle list. May be combined with explicit events.

threshold_score.description: Optional threshold for `score.threshold` alerts. Defaults to 60 when omitted.

get.description: Returns all registered webhooks with delivery stats. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**
Returns one webhook plus recent delivery attempts. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Webhook ID

delete.description: Deactivates a webhook subscription. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Webhook ID

404.description: Webhook not found or already disabled

post.description: Sends a test event payload to the webhook endpoint to verify connectivity. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Webhook ID

success.description: Whether the test delivery returned a 2xx status

status_code.description: HTTP status code from the webhook endpoint

get.description: Returns the preset catalog for managed score and DJD Forensics monitoring bundles.

post.description: Self-service wallet-scoped webhook registration for API key holders. Provide either `events`, `preset`, or `presets`. If `score.threshold` is selected without an explicit `threshold_score`, the service defaults to 60. Use `forensics_filter` to restrict DJD Forensics alerts by minimum resulting risk level and/or report reasons. Managed presets also include anomaly-driven monitoring for score drops, balance freefalls, and new Sybil flags. Limited to 10 active webhooks per wallet. **Requires Bearer API key authentication.**

url.description: HTTPS endpoint to receive webhook payloads

events.description: Explicit events to subscribe to. May be combined with presets.

preset.description: Optional preset that expands to a managed event set

presets.description: Optional preset bundle list. May be combined with explicit events.

threshold_score.description: Optional threshold for `score.threshold` alerts. Defaults to 60 when omitted.

get.description: Lists all webhooks belonging to the authenticated wallet. **Requires Bearer API key authentication.**

200.description: Webhook list for the authenticated wallet

delete.description: Deactivates one webhook belonging to the authenticated wallet. **Requires Bearer API key authentication.**

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Webhook ID

404.description: Webhook not found or already disabled

get.description: Returns the managed score and DJD Forensics monitoring policies available for `/v1/monitor` subscriptions.

post.description: Creates a managed monitoring subscription for a target wallet and provisions the underlying webhook delivery automatically. Policies can target any wallet; delivery is sent to your HTTPS endpoint. `score_monitoring` supports `threshold_score`. Forensics policies support `forensics_filter`. `anomaly_monitoring` delivers score-drop, score-spike, balance-freefall, and sybil-flag alerts. **Requires Bearer API key authentication.**

target_wallet.description: Wallet to monitor. Defaults to the authenticated wallet when omitted.

url.description: HTTPS endpoint to receive monitoring webhook deliveries.

threshold_score.description: Optional score threshold for `score_monitoring`. Defaults to 60 when omitted.

429.description: Maximum monitoring subscriptions per subscriber exceeded

get.description: Lists all managed monitoring subscriptions owned by the authenticated API-key subscriber. **Requires Bearer API key authentication.**

delete.description: Deactivates a managed monitoring subscription and its underlying webhook delivery configuration. **Requires Bearer API key authentication.**

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Monitoring subscription ID

404.description: Monitoring subscription not found or already disabled

get.description: Returns paginated score history with trend analysis for a wallet. Supports date-range filtering and configurable result limits. **Requires x402 payment of $0.15 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to return (1-100, default 50)

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return records after this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return records before this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

404.description: No score history found for this wallet

get.description: Returns a wallet-level forensics summary: active fraud report counts, total penalties, reporter breadth, dispute status, and the most recent incidents. **Requires x402 payment of $0.10 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

post.description: Allows the reported wallet to open a dispute against a specific fraud report. The disputing wallet is derived from the x402 payment or API key identity and must match the report target wallet. **Requires x402 payment of $0.05 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

409.description: Dispute already exists or wallet is not authorized to dispute this report

get.description: Returns recent fraud-report incidents across the corpus. Supports reason and date-range filtering plus configurable result limits. **Requires x402 payment of $0.30 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Optional report reason filter

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of incidents to return (1-100, default 50)

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return incidents after this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return incidents before this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

get.description: Returns a ranked watchlist of the most-reported wallets across the corpus. Supports date-range filtering and configurable result limits. **Requires x402 payment of $0.25 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of wallets to return (1-100, default 50)

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return incidents after this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return incidents before this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

get.description: Returns fraud-report incidents for a wallet with full report details. Supports date-range filtering and configurable result limits. **Requires x402 payment of $0.15 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of reports to return (1-100, default 50)

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return reports after this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return reports before this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

get.description: Returns a merged timeline of score snapshots and fraud incidents for a wallet. Supports date-range filtering and configurable result limits. **Requires x402 payment of $0.20 USDC on Base or Bearer API key.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of combined events to return (1-100, default 50)

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return events after this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return events before this ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD)

404.description: No forensics data found for this wallet

post.description: Legacy DJD Certify purchase path for the default transactional tier. Requirements: active (non-expired) score, composite score >= 75, and a registered agent. Certification is valid for 1 year and requires x402 payment of $200 USDC on Base.

409.description: Wallet already has an active certification

get.description: Returns whether a wallet can apply for a requested DJD Certify tier right now, which requirements are met, what is blocking it, and the next recommended actions.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Ethereum wallet address

parameters.name: tier
parameters.description: Requested certification tier

get.description: Returns the latest certification review request and reviewer status for a wallet.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Ethereum wallet address

post.description: Creates a certification review request for an eligible wallet before the final certification purchase. Optionally specify a requested tier.

409.description: Wallet already has an active certification

get.description: Returns a public directory of active DJD certifications with current score context, profile metadata, and direct links into standards and evaluator surfaces.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of certifications to return (default 25, max 100)

parameters.name: tier
parameters.description: Filter to a specific certification tier

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by wallet, profile name, description, GitHub URL, or website URL

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort the directory by score, confidence, recency, or name

get.description: Returns the active certification details for a wallet. Free — no payment required.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Ethereum wallet address

404.description: No active certification found for this wallet

get.description: Returns an embeddable shields.io-style SVG badge showing the wallet's certification status. Green if certified, gray if not. Cached for 1 hour. Free — no payment required.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Ethereum wallet address

get.description: Returns all certifications including revoked ones. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**

post.description: Revokes an active certification. Optionally provide a reason. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Certification ID

404.description: Certification not found or already revoked

get.description: Returns certification revenue summary including total, active, and revoked counts, gross and net revenue, and monthly breakdown. **Requires admin authentication (X-ADMIN-KEY header).**
Returns the DJD Certify tier ladder, including score floors, prices, controls, and the default tier.

post.description: Purchase Tier 1 Operational certification. Requirements: active (non-expired) score, composite score >= 60, and a registered agent. Certification is valid for 1 year and requires x402 payment of $50 USDC on Base.

409.description: Wallet already has an active certification

post.description: Purchase Tier 2 Transactional certification. Requirements: active (non-expired) score, composite score >= 75, and a registered agent. Certification is valid for 1 year and requires x402 payment of $200 USDC on Base.

409.description: Wallet already has an active certification

post.description: Purchase Tier 3 Autonomous certification. Requirements: active (non-expired) score, composite score >= 90, and a registered agent. Certification is valid for 1 year and requires x402 payment of $500 USDC on Base.

409.description: Wallet already has an active certification

get.description: Returns a settlement evidence packet that packages the evaluator verdict with certification baseline, forensics summary, and traceable artifact links.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Ethereum wallet address

get.description: ERC-8183 oracle-style verdict endpoint that persists a compact settlement decision with recommendation, forensic trace id, and a signed EIP-712 attestation when a signer is configured.

parameters.name: counterparty_wallet
parameters.description: Optional client or counterparty wallet

parameters.name: escrow_id
parameters.description: Optional escrow or settlement reference id

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Target evaluator network. Use `base` for Base mainnet or `base-sepolia` for Base Sepolia.

get.description: Fetch a previously issued evaluator oracle verdict record by id, including its attestation metadata.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Stored evaluator verdict id returned by the oracle endpoint

get.description: List recent persisted evaluator verdicts for a wallet, including approval and dispute mix.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max verdicts to return (default 10, max 50)

get.description: Convert a stored evaluator verdict into ABI-backed callback calldata for a relayer or escrow contract. Returns a ready=false envelope when the verdict attestation is unsigned.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Stored evaluator verdict id to convert into callback calldata

parameters.name: target_contract
parameters.description: Optional target contract address to place into the returned transaction envelope

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Target evaluator network. Use `base` for Base mainnet or `base-sepolia` for Base Sepolia.

get.description: Returns the free onchain integration package for DJD evaluator verdicts, including the callback ABI, Solidity verifier ABI, EIP-712 typed-data schema, and Solidity sources for Base-side verification.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Target evaluator network. Use `base` for Base mainnet or `base-sepolia` for Base Sepolia.

get.description: Returns the contract-ready verifyVerdict calldata for a stored evaluator verdict when the verdict attestation is signed. If target_contract is omitted and a published verifier deployment exists for the requested network, the returned transaction envelope targets that live verifier automatically. Returns ready=false when the verdict is unsigned.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Stored evaluator verdict id to convert into verifier calldata

parameters.name: target_contract
parameters.description: Optional verifier contract address to place into the returned transaction envelope

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Target evaluator network. Use `base` for Base mainnet or `base-sepolia` for Base Sepolia.

get.description: Returns the contract-ready settleWithDJDVerdict calldata for the reference DJD escrow consumer contract when the stored verdict attestation is signed. If escrow_contract is omitted and a published escrow deployment exists for the requested network, the returned transaction envelope targets that live escrow automatically. Returns ready=false when the verdict is unsigned.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Stored evaluator verdict id to convert into escrow settlement calldata

parameters.name: escrow_contract
parameters.description: Optional deployed escrow consumer contract address to place into the returned transaction envelope

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Target evaluator network. Use `base` for Base mainnet or `base-sepolia` for Base Sepolia.

get.description: Returns constructor args and readiness metadata for deploying the DJD verdict verifier and the reference escrow consumer contract from a stored evaluator verdict. If verifier_contract is omitted and a published verifier deployment exists for the requested network, the plan reuses that live verifier automatically.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Stored evaluator verdict id to use for constructor args

parameters.name: verifier_contract
parameters.description: Optional already-deployed verifier contract address to wire into the escrow consumer constructor

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Target evaluator network. Use `base` for Base mainnet or `base-sepolia` for Base Sepolia.

get.description: Returns the free compiled Solidity artifact package for DJD onchain integrations, including ABI, bytecode, constructor metadata, and compiler settings.
Returns a one-shot deployment bundle that combines verdict-driven constructor args with the compiled verifier and escrow artifacts for operator tooling.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Stored evaluator verdict id to use for deployment planning

parameters.name: verifier_contract
parameters.description: Optional existing verifier contract address to reuse instead of deploying a new verifier

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Target evaluator network. Use `base` for Base mainnet or `base-sepolia` for Base Sepolia.

get.description: Free catalog of supported evaluator/onchain networks, including Base mainnet and Base Sepolia deployment metadata.

200.description: Supported evaluator networks and deployment metadata.

get.description: Free registry of currently published DJD evaluator verifier and escrow contract addresses by supported network.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Optional network filter. Defaults to returning all supported networks.

200.description: Published evaluator deployments keyed by network.

get.summary: Fetch env bundle for the active published evaluator deployment
get.description: Free promotion bundle that turns the currently published DJD evaluator verifier and escrow deployment into ready-to-consume environment variables and export formats for CI or downstream consumers.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Optional network filter. Defaults to the primary DJD evaluator network.

200.description: Published deployment env bundle for the requested network.

wallet.name: wallet
wallet.description: Base wallet address (EIP-55 checksummed or lowercase)

X-Request-ID.name: X-Request-ID
X-Request-ID.description: Client-provided request ID for tracing. If omitted, the server generates a UUID v4. Returned in the X-Request-ID response header.

computedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the score was computed (may differ from lastUpdated when served from cache)

scoreFreshness.description: Freshness factor: 1 = just computed, decays linearly toward 0 at cache expiry. Consumers can use this to weight trust.

stale.description: True when RPC was unavailable and a cached result was returned

tx_hash.description: Indexed transaction hash between payer and rated wallet with at least $0.10 USDC of settlement

agent_wallet.description: Agent wallet receiving the creator stake

stake_tx_hash.description: Indexed USDC transfer hash for the creator -> agent stake transfer

fee_tx_hash.description: Indexed USDC transfer hash for the creator -> PAY_TO 1% DJD fee transfer

reported.description: True if the wallet has active fraud reports

disputeStatus.description: Aggregate dispute state for reports filed against this wallet

report_id.description: Fraud report ID from the reports or feed endpoints

details.description: Supporting explanation or evidence for the dispute

key.description: The raw API key (djd_live_...) — returned ONLY on creation

key_prefix.description: First 16 characters of the key for identification

secret.description: HMAC secret for verifying webhook signatures — returned ONLY on creation
HMAC secret for verifying webhook signatures — returned ONLY on creation

minimum_risk_level.description: Only emit Forensics events whose resulting risk level meets or exceeds this threshold.

reasons.description: Only emit Forensics events tied to these report reasons.

secret.description: HMAC secret for verifying webhook signatures — returned ONLY on creation

returned.description: Number of records in this response

trend.description: Trend analysis (present when 2+ data points exist)

change_pct.description: Percentage change from earliest to latest score

count.description: Total combined events matching the query

returned.description: Number of events in this response
Number of reports in this response
Number of wallets in this response
Number of incidents in this response

PaymentRequired.description: x402 payment required. The response includes a WWW-Authenticate header with payment details. Use an x402-compatible client to pay and retry.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded (120 requests/hour per payer wallet on paid endpoints)

FreeTierExhausted.description: Free tier daily quota exhausted (10 requests/day). Upgrade to paid x402 for unlimited access.

x402.description: x402 micropayment protocol (EIP-3009 USDC transferWithAuthorization on Base). See https://www.x402.org for client libraries.

adminKey.name: x-admin-key
adminKey.description: Admin API key for management endpoints
